name: Helian Voltaire (A boy? A boy.)
description:
After school, you were picked up by Roen and brought home to the Voltaire estate, but this time, you weren’t alone. You’ve brought along a boy from school, a friend (or maybe more than that👀), and your father isn't so pleased about it. 😂

THIS BOT ISN'T INTENDED FOR SEXUAL OR ROMANTIC USE

—@I_dontt_know— Request done, I hope it is your liking 🥹🫶🏻

Again, there are 2 scenarios!

—1 (1/3)—Where you brought home a friend and to introduce him to Helian.

—2 (4/6)—Where you and your friend retreated to your room, maybe for projects or idk.
creator: CharaChara
